questions.q: The actor Mohanlal is primarily associated with which Indian film industry?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal is one of the leading and co-defining stars of Malayalam cinema.

questions.q: In which year was the Malayalam actor Mohanlal born?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal was born on 21 May 1960.

questions.q: Mohanlal is widely referred to by which nickname among Malayalam film fans?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal is affectionately known as Lalettan by his fans and the Malayalam film community.

questions.q: For which 1991 film did Mohanlal win his first National Film Award for Best Actor?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal won the National Film Award for Best Actor for his role in Bharatham (1991).

questions.q: In the film Bharatham, Mohanlal plays a character belonging to which profession?
questions.explanation: In Bharatham, Mohanlal plays Gopinathan, a Carnatic classical singer.

questions.q: Mohanlal frequently collaborated with which Malayalam director on classics such as Kireedam and Bharatham?
questions.explanation: Director Sibi Malayil worked with Mohanlal on several acclaimed films including Kireedam (1989) and Bharatham (1991).

questions.q: In the 1987 Priyadarshan comedy Nadodikkattu, Mohanlal shares the screen with which actor as the duo Dasan and Vijayan?
questions.explanation: In Nadodikkattu (1987), Mohanlal plays Dasan opposite Sreenivasan's Vijayan in Priyadarshan's hit comedy.

questions.q: Mohanlal received which national civilian honour from the Government of India in 2019?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal was awarded the Padma Bhushan in 2019; he had earlier received the Padma Shri in 2001.

questions.q: In which acclaimed 1987 film directed by P. Padmarajan did Mohanlal play the lead character Jayakrishnan?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal played Jayakrishnan in P. Padmarajan's romantic classic Thoovanathumbikal (1987).

questions.q: Which honorary rank did the Indian Territorial Army confer on Mohanlal in 2009?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal was made an Honorary Lieutenant Colonel in the Territorial Army in 2009.

questions.q: For which 1999 film did Mohanlal win a National Film Award special jury mention, portraying a Kathakali artist?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal received a special jury mention at the National Film Awards for Vanaprastham (1999).

questions.q: In which film did Mohanlal debut as a lead actor in 1980, marking the start of his career?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal's breakthrough as a lead came with Manjil Virinja Pookkal (1980), in which he played a villain.

questions.q: Mohanlal played the iconic feudal-lord character Mangalassery Neelakandan in which 1993 film directed by I. V. Sasi?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal played Mangalassery Neelakandan in Devasuram (1993), written by Ranjith and directed by I. V. Sasi.

questions.q: In the 1990 musical film His Highness Abdullah, Mohanlal plays a character who arrives at a palace disguised as what?
questions.explanation: In His Highness Abdullah (1990), Mohanlal plays a contract killer who poses as a musician inside an aristocratic household.

questions.q: In the 1989 film Kireedam, Mohanlal plays Sethumadhavan, a young man who aspires to become what before tragedy strikes?
questions.explanation: In Kireedam, Sethumadhavan dreams of joining the police like his father but is dragged into a life of violence.

questions.q: Mohanlal produced and starred in which 1996 film, considered one of the costliest Malayalam productions of its time, directed by Priyadarshan?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal's company Pranavam Arts produced Kaalapani (1996), a period film set in the Cellular Jail of the Andamans.

questions.q: In Mani Ratnam's 1997 Tamil film Iruvar, Mohanlal played a character widely seen as inspired by which real figure?
questions.explanation: In Iruvar, Mohanlal's character Anandan is broadly modelled on actor-politician M. G. Ramachandran.

questions.q: Which 2005 film, directed by Blessy, features Mohanlal as a man suffering from early-onset Alzheimer's disease?
questions.explanation: In Thanmathra (2005), Mohanlal plays Ramesan Nair, a government employee gradually losing his memory to Alzheimer's.

questions.q: Mohanlal portrayed Georgekutty in which 2013 thriller, which became one of the highest-grossing Malayalam films and later got a sequel?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal played Georgekutty, a man protecting his family, in Jeethu Joseph's Drishyam (2013).

questions.q: Which 2016 action film starring Mohanlal as Murugan became one of the first Malayalam films to gross over 100 crore?
questions.explanation: Pulimurugan (2016), directed by Vysakh, featured Mohanlal as a tiger hunter and became a major commercial success.

questions.q: Which 2019 film marked Prithviraj Sukumaran's directorial debut and featured Mohanlal in the lead role of Stephen Nedumpally?
questions.explanation: Lucifer (2019), directed by Prithviraj Sukumaran, starred Mohanlal as Stephen Nedumpally and was a blockbuster.

questions.q: Mohanlal made his directorial debut with which fantasy-adventure film?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal directed his first film, the fantasy adventure Barroz, released in 2024.

questions.q: In which historical epic does Mohanlal play the 16th-century naval commander Kunjali Marakkar IV, a film that won the National Award for Best Feature Film?
questions.explanation: Marakkar: Arabikadalinte Simham, in which Mohanlal plays Kunjali Marakkar IV, won the National Award for Best Feature Film at the 67th National Film Awards.

questions.q: In which year did Mohanlal make his acting debut in the unreleased-at-the-time film Thiranottam?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal first acted in Thiranottam in 1978, though the film was released only decades later in 2005.

questions.q: Mohanlal's 1986 film Rajavinte Makan, a gangster drama that boosted his stardom, was directed by whom?
questions.explanation: Rajavinte Makan (1986) was directed by Thampi Kannanthanam and established Mohanlal as a leading action-drama star.

questions.q: Which screenwriter penned several of Mohanlal's defining films, including Kireedam, Bharatham and His Highness Abdullah?
questions.explanation: A. K. Lohithadas wrote several of Mohanlal's landmark films including Kireedam (1989), Bharatham (1991) and His Highness Abdullah (1990).

questions.q: Mohanlal played the dual-natured antihero Aadu Thoma in which 1995 film directed by Bhadran?
questions.explanation: In Spadikam (1995), directed by Bhadran, Mohanlal played the rebellious Thomas Chacko, nicknamed Aadu Thoma.

questions.q: Which director helmed the 1999 Indo-French co-production Vanaprastham, in which Mohanlal played a Kathakali artist?
questions.explanation: Vanaprastham (1999) was directed by Shaji N. Karun and was an Indo-French co-production featuring Mohanlal as a Kathakali artist.

questions.q: From which Kerala university did Mohanlal receive an honorary doctorate in 2010?
options: Cochin University of Science and Technology
questions.explanation: Mohanlal received an honorary doctorate from the Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit in 2010; the University of Calicut later honoured him in 2018.

questions.q: Which composer created the songs for the Mohanlal classical-music dramas His Highness Abdullah (1990) and Bharatham (1991)?
questions.explanation: Raveendran composed the songs for both His Highness Abdullah (1990) and Bharatham (1991), two acclaimed Mohanlal films built around Indian classical music.
